episodes.title: Pritzker: Clinton ‘clearly mistaken’ after Epstein flight claim is recanted
episodes.description: Gov. J.B. Pritzker says former President Bill Clinton was “clearly mistaken” after Clinton recanted deposition comments suggesting Pritzker traveled on Jeffrey Epstein’s plane, with the governor insisting he never flew on the aircraft.

episodes.title: Bill Clinton mentions JB Pritzker during Epstein deposition
episodes.description: New video from Bill Clinton's Jeffrey Epstein deposition last week shows a reference to Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker.

episodes.title: Lawmakers introduce bill to create the Illinois Epstein Files Investigation Commission
episodes.description: Illinois Rep. Abdelnasser Rashid and State  Sen. Graciela Guzman announce legislation to create the Illinois Epstein Files Investigation Commission, an independent body to investigate Epstein-related crimes in the state.

episodes.title: Illinois Democrats propose independent commission to investigate state ties to Epstein
episodes.description: Illinois Democrats on Monday introduced legislation to create an independent state commission to investigate potential Illinois connections to Jeffrey Epstein’s sex trafficking operation, arguing the state has the authority to examine whether Illinois laws were broken.

episodes.title: IL lawmakers push for Epstein investigation | The Chicago Report
episodes.description: Illinois wants to be the first state with a commission to investigate any ties to Jeffrey Epstein. A state lawmaker joined The Chicago Report to discuss the effort.

episodes.title: Illinois lawmakers propose Epstein files investigation
episodes.description: Illinois wants to be the first state with a commission to investigate any ties to Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: Illinois lawmakers propose Epstein Files Investigation Commission with subpoena power
episodes.description: Illinois lawmakers have introduced House Bill 5723 to create an independent “Illinois Epstein Files Investigation Commission” to examine Jeffrey Epstein’s alleged sex trafficking network and its ties to Illinois, with supporters citing survivor safety, unanswered questions, and concerns about corruption as key reasons for the state-led probe.

episodes.title: Bill Clinton set to testify in Epstein probe, what we know
episodes.description: Bill Clinton will testify on Friday to the House Oversight Committee as part of a probe into Jeffrey Epstein, and it will mark the first time a former president will be forced to testify before Congress.

episodes.title: Former Prince Andrew released as new Epstein files renew focus on trafficking networks
episodes.description: As former Prince Andrew faces scrutiny over alleged ties to Jeffrey Epstein, newly released Justice Department files are intensifying questions about accountability, survivor protections, and the broader systems that enable sex trafficking and exploitation.
